_comment: Personas drive permission trimming. A persona sees a fixture if the fixture acl contains the persona id OR 'all'. delivery_principal = full delivery view incl client-confidential escalations + commercial budget; consultant = internal engagement + budget summary but NOT client-restricted escalations; contractor = least privilege; director = sees everything.

personas.label: Nina Alvarez — Delivery Principal (covering Brightwater)
personas.description: Full delivery leadership view including client-confidential escalations and commercial budget/utilisation.

personas.label: Priya Deshmukh — Lead Consultant
personas.description: Sees all internal engagement signals and the engagement budget summary, but NOT client-confidential escalation threads or the commercial rate card.

personas.label: Lena Frost — Subcontractor Consultant (vendor)
personas.description: Least-privilege vendor. Sees only non-sensitive engagement signals; cannot see client escalations, budget/utilisation, or the commercial rate card.

personas.label: Sofia Marin — Director, Consulting Delivery (escalation)
personas.description: Executive escalation view. Sees everything delivery_principal sees.
